hero.badge: 🌟 Most Popular English Course in Egypt
hero.subtext: Join thousands of students who transformed their English skills with our proven method. From zero to fluent — your journey starts here.

features.title: Everything You Need to Succeed
features.subtitle: A comprehensive approach designed to take you from beginner to confident English speaker.

items.title: Conversation Skills
items.desc: Practice real-world English conversations through interactive live sessions and role-play exercises.

items.title: Simple Grammar
items.desc: Master English grammar rules through easy-to-understand explanations and fun daily exercises.

items.title: Practical Training
items.desc: Apply what you learn immediately with hands-on projects, quizzes, and real-scenario tasks.

items.title: Continuous Support
items.desc: Get personalized feedback and 24/7 support from your instructor throughout your journey.

howItWorks.title: Get Started in 3 Simple Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Our streamlined onboarding process gets you learning English within minutes.

steps.title: Register for the Course
steps.desc: Sign up quickly and get instant access to your personalized student dashboard.

steps.title: Start Your Lessons
steps.desc: Follow our structured curriculum with live and recorded lessons at your own pace.

steps.title: Level Up
steps.desc: Track your progress, earn certificates, and achieve fluency with consistent practice.

testimonials.title: What Our Students Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from real students who transformed their English with us.

items.name: Sarah Ahmed
items.text: This course completely changed how I speak English. The instructor is amazing and the lessons are so clear. I went from barely speaking to having full conversations in just 3 months!

items.name: Mohamed Khaled
items.text: I needed English for my job interviews and this course delivered exactly that. The practical approach and constant support made all the difference. Highly recommended!

items.name: Nour Hassan
items.text: This course transformed my professional life. I improved my English and closed deals with foreign clients. Best investment I ever made.

items.name: Layla Ibrahim
items.text: The medical English module was exactly what I needed. The instructor tailors the content to your profession. I can now attend international conferences with confidence!

items.name: Omar Youssef
items.text: Worth every penny! The speaking exercises and grammar simplified approach helped me write better emails and present in English to senior management. Superb!

items.name: Rina Saleh
items.text: I was afraid my level was too low, but the simple teaching style and the instructor's encouragement cleared that fear. Now I teach English to my students with confidence!

pricing.title: One Course. Lifetime Value.
pricing.subtitle: A single, transparent price for a lifetime of English fluency.

finalCta.title: Start Your English Journey Today
finalCta.subtitle: Join over 1,200 students already mastering English. Don't wait — your future self will thank you.
finalCta.note: No credit card required for your first lesson

footer.tagline: Empowering Arabic speakers to master English with confidence, clarity, and joy.
